summary: Iteration 28 - Balance Sync Bug Fix VERIFIED. All 14 backend tests passed (10 initially + 4 after rate limit cooldown). Critical bug fix confirmed: sell/swap/offramp endpoints now correctly DEBIT NENO from internal balance. Frontend verified: NenoExchange page loads with balance display, all 6 tabs functional, Dashboard shows 'I Miei Token Personalizzati' section and 'Crea Token Personalizzato' button.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX VERIFIED: sell endpoint (lines 357-368) now always debits NENO regardless of tx_hash presence
BUG FIX VERIFIED: swap endpoint (lines 440-447) now always debits from_asset regardless of tx_hash presence
BUG FIX VERIFIED: offramp endpoint (lines 804-808) now always debits NENO regardless of tx_hash presence
Balance persistence confirmed: after sell/swap/offramp, refetched balances match expected values
Insufficient balance errors (400) correctly returned for all three endpoints
Frontend 5s polling (lines 148-160) working for real-time balance sync
Immediate balance update from response (line 282) working correctly
seed_data_creation: Created test tokens during regression tests (T*, B*, S* symbols)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 verified the critical balance sync bug fix. The fix removed 'if not onchain_tx' guards around debit operations in sell/swap/offramp endpoints. Now NENO is always debited from internal wallet, which is correct because verify-deposit already credits NENO when on-chain tx is received. Rate limiting is active (429 after ~10 rapid requests). NENO balance shown: 9927.3680.

bug_fix_offramp.POST /api/neno-exchange/offramp: PASS - NENO debited, neno_balance in response decreased

regression_tests.POST /api/neno-exchange/buy: PASS - Buy NENO with EUR still works
regression_tests.POST /api/neno-exchange/create-token: PASS - Create custom token still works
regression_tests.POST /api/neno-exchange/buy-custom-token: PASS - Buy custom token still works
regression_tests.POST /api/neno-exchange/sell-custom-toke: PASS - Sell custom token still works

frontend_neno_exchange.Tab buy: PASS - Asset select, amount input, buy button, quote info

mocked_apis.note: All balance operations are REAL MongoDB operations

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The sell/swap/offramp endpoints had an 'if not onchain_tx:' guard around the _debit() calls. When tx_hash was provided (on-chain transactions), the debit was skipped. But verify-deposit already credits NENO to internal wallet when on-chain tx is received, so the debit must ALWAYS happen.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Removed the 'if not onchain_tx:' guard around debit operations in sell (line 367), swap (line 446), and offramp (line 807) endpoints. Now NENO is always debited from internal wallet.
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All 14 tests passed confirming: (1) NENO is debited on sell/swap/offramp, (2) receive_asset is credited, (3) balance changes persist after refetch, (4) insufficient balance returns 400 error
